violations.text: 3 bay sink discharge pipe leaking when in use. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2026
The floor under the 3-bay sink the 1 door reach-in is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
The wall by the stairwell and 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Pasta was moved to sheet pan at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
The floor under the 3-bay sink and the wall by the 1 door reach-in is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on the chest freezer were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2023
The floors in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
